jobs.title: Senior Frontend Software Engineer
jobs.description:
## Senior Frontend Software Engineer

### Descrizione
- **Job Title**: Senior Frontend Developer
- **Working Model**: Hybrid from Chiasso
- **Team**: Payments and Fintech Engineering team
- **Level**: Professional
- **Location**: Chiasso, Switzerland
- **Contract**: Permanent - full-time (36 h/week)

### What your impact will be:
- Coding new features, fixing bugs and optimizing code
- Working with the team to break down User Stories into tasks
- Analyzing performance metrics and logs using monitoring tools
- Updating technical documentation
- Collaborating with designers, testers, product owners and other developers
- Conducting and participating in code reviews
- Evolving and maintaining our websites
- Performance optimizations
- Technical reviews

### Job Title: Brand: lastminute.com Department: Technology Location: Chiasso, Switzerland Contract: Full-time Main Language: English Apply now

### Qualifications
- **Your expertise**:
  - Deep understanding of React.js, including its core principles, such as Hooks and state management.
  - Proficiency in: JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3.
  - Experience with: TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js and the NPM ecosystem, Testing frameworks, especially Jest.
  - Git, git-flow and version control best practices.
  - Communicative English

- **Desirable**:
  - Knowledge of AI coding assistants like Claude Code
  - Practical knowledge of accessibility standards and best practices.
  - Knowledge of CSS-in-JS libraries or frameworks.
  - Understanding of Next.js server-side rendering (SSR), static site generation (SSG), and API routes.
  - Familiarity with testing tools like React Testing Library, Playwright, or Cypress.
  - Browser, Server and CDN Caching Techniques.

### Additional Information
- **How we work together**:
  - Inclusive, friendly, and international environment (you’ll be working with colleagues from +10 countries and over 48 nationalities)
  - Shorter working week (36h as full time), with a half working day on Fridays
  - Flexible start and end of the working day
  - Possibility to work from anywhere for a period of time per year defined according to local regulations

- **How we learn together**:
  - Fri-Yays: half a day on Friday morning with a no-meeting mandate and dedicated to deep work, personal growth, learning and training and/or focus time.
  - Professional and managerial skills development training paths, access to e-learning platforms such as O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (depending on the department), and to our internal platform offering bespoke training content

- **Other perks**:
  - 2 paid days off per year for volunteering purposes
  - Occasional social events to foster connections among colleagues
  - Travel industry discounts and flash exclusive staff fares
  - Support through life’s significant moments with leave options (e.g parental responsibilities, marriages, bereavements, relocations, etc.) in line with local laws

### Selection process steps:
- **Remote**: HR interview (30 minutes)
- **On-site, Chiasso**: Manager Interview + Pair Programming session with the team (90 minutes)
- **Offer extended** (*Please note the process can slightly vary. The recruiter in charge will share more details when setting up the interview)

### Our commitment to celebrate diversity and generate belonging
- At the heart of our culture is a commitment to inclusion across race, gender, age, sexual orientation, religion, gender identity or expression, and accessibility.
- We strongly believe in an equal opportunity space, which is welcoming and celebrates the uniqueness of everyone who works here.
- We value different lived experiences and respect viewpoints, as we know unicity drives innovation.
- We want to make sure our people reflect the communities across the world we help travel.

### Eligibility criteria
- By submitting your information and application, you confirm that you are legally authorized to work in the country of employment and that you do not require visa sponsorship to obtain employment visa status.
requirements: With technology, we turn spontaneous thoughts into meaningful experiences, helping people travel the world.
We value different lived experiences and respect viewpoints, as we know unicity drives innovation.

**Level**: Professional - **Ort**: Chiasso, Schweiz - **Vertrag**: Permanenter - Vollzeit (36 h/Week) ### Dein Einfluss: - Entwicklung neuer Funktionen, Fehlerbehebung und Optimierung des Codes - Zusammenarbeit mit dem Team, um User Stories in Aufgaben zu zerlegen - Analyse von Leistungsmetriken und Protokollen mit Hilfe von Überwachungstools - Aktualisierung der technischen Dokumentation - Zusammenarbeit mit Designern, Testern, Produktverantwortlichen und anderen Entwicklern - Durchführung und Teilnahme an Code-Reviews - Weiterentwicklung und Wartung unserer Websites - Leistungsoptimierungen - technische Reviews ### Job Title: Marke: lastminute.com Abteilung: Technologie Ort: Chiasso, Schweiz Vertrag: Vollzeit Hauptsprache: Englisch Bewerben ### Qualifikationen - **Deine Expertise**: - Tiefe Kenntnisse von React.js, einschließlich seiner Kernprinzipien wie Hooks und State-Management. - Profizienz in: JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3. - Erfahrung mit: TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js und der NPM-Ecosystem, Test-Frameworks, insbesondere Jest. - Git, git-flow und Versionierungsbest Practices. - Kommunikative Englisch - **Wünschenswert**: - Kenntnisse von AI-Code-Assistenten wie Claude Code - Praktische Kenntnisse von Barrierenfreundlichkeitstandards und -best Practices. - Kenntnisse von CSS-in-JS-Bibliotheken oder -Frameworks. - Verständnis von Next.js-Server-Seitenerenderung (SSR), statischer Sitegenerierung (SSG) und API-Routen. - Vertrautheit mit Test-Tools wie React Testing Library, Playwright oder Cypress. - Browser-, Server- und CDN-Caching-Techniken. ### Zusätzliche Informationen - **Wie wir zusammenarbeiten**: - Inklusiver, freundlicher und internationaler Arbeitsumfeld (du arbeitest mit Kollegen aus +10 Ländern und über 48 Nationalitäten) - Kurzerer Arbeitswoche (36h als Vollzeit), mit einem halben Arbeitstag am Freitag - Flexible Start- und Endzeit des Arbeitszeit - Möglichkeit, aus dem ganzen Jahr für einen bestimmten Zeitraum nach den lokalen Vorschriften von überall aus zu arbeiten - **Wie wir zusammen lernen**: - Fri-Yays: halber Tag am Freitagmorgen mit einer Nicht-Meeting-Mandat und gerichtet auf tiefes Arbeiten, persönliches Wachstum, Lernen und Training und/oder Fokuszeit. - Professionelle und managerial Skills-Entwicklungspfade, Zugang zu e-Learning-Plattformen wie O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (je nach Abteilung) und zu unserer internen Plattform, die maßgeschneiderte Trainingsinhalte bietet - **Sonstige Vorteile**: - 2 bezahlte Tage pro Jahr für Freiwilligendienste - Gelegentliche soziale Veranstaltungen, um Verbindungen unter Kollegen zu fördern - Reisebranchen-Geschenke und flash-exklusive Mitarbeiter-Fahrten - Unterstützung bei den wichtigsten Lebensmomente mit Urlaubsoptionen (z.B. Elternzeit, Heirat, Trauer, Umzug etc.) im Einklang mit den lokalen Gesetzen ### Auswahlprozessschritte: - **Remote**: HR-Interview (30 Minuten) - **On-site, Chiasso**: Manager-Interview + Pair-Programming-Session mit dem Team (90 Minuten) - **Bewerbung ausgestellt** (*Bitte beachten Sie, dass der Prozess leicht variieren kann. Der im Einsatz befindliche Recruiter wird Ihnen mehr Details teilen, wenn Sie das Interview einrichten) ### Unsere Verpflichtung, Diversität zu feiern und Gemeinschaft zu generieren - Im Herzen unserer Kultur liegt eine Verpflichtung zur Inklusion über Rasse, Geschlecht, Alter, sexuelle Orientierung, Religion, Geschlechtsidentität oder -ausdruck und Barrierefreiheit. - Wir glauben stark an einen gleichberechtigten Arbeitsplatz, der willkommen ist und die Einzigartigkeit jeder Person feiert, die hier arbeitet. - Wir schätzen unterschiedliche Lebenserfahrungen und respektieren Meinungen, da wir wissen, dass Einzigartigkeit Innovation treibt. - Wir möchten sicherstellen, dass unsere Mitarbeiter die Communities weltweit widerspiegeln, die wir helfen, zu reisen. ### Eligibilitätskriterien - Durch die Abgabe Ihrer Informationen und Bewerbung bestätigen Sie, dass Sie rechtlich berechtigt sind, in dem Land der Beschäftigung zu arbeiten und dass Sie keine Visa-Sponsorship benötigen, um eine Arbeitsvisa zu erhalten.

jobs.title: Principal Product Researcher
jobs.description:
## Descrizione
# Principal Product Researcher Careers Principal Product Researcher Share this job: Principal Product ResearcherPrincipal Product Researchercorporate.lastminute.comhttps://corporate.lastminute.com/careers/job/?id=744000113718427&jobName=Principal%20Product%20Researcher

The Company  
At lastminute.com, we live for the holidays. We are the European Travel-Tech leader in Dynamic Holiday Packages. With technology, we turn spontaneous thoughts into meaningful experiences, helping people travel the world.

Job Description  
We are looking for a Principal Product Researcher to join our team of around 1,700 people worldwide to help us power up the traveller’s journey for millions of holidaymakers. If you are passionate about guiding product decisions through a deep understanding of users, keep on reading, as you might be the perfect fit for this job.

The job in brief:  
Job Title - Principal Product Researcher  
Working model - hybrid from Switzerland  
Team - you will join the Revenues & Operations department.  
Level – Professional  
Contract - Permanent – full-time (EUR 36 h/week)

## Mansioni
- Own the research practice and roadmap: Define, evolve, and scale research processes, activities, and priorities across the organization.  
- Lead impactful studies: Plan, conduct, analyze, and present generative and evaluative research on our most critical problem spaces, touchpoints, and projects.  
- Embed research into workflows: Partner closely with cross-functional teams to integrate research into decision-making, ensuring insights are timely, actionable, and drive outcomes.  
- Centralize and synthesize insights: Connect data from user research, behavioral analytics, and business inputs into a shared repository that informs both strategic direction and day-to-day decisions.  
- Champion the customer: Advocate for user needs and perspectives in product discussions, ensuring decisions are grounded in a deep understanding of our travelers.  
- Shape research operations: Evolve research ops and documentation practices to increase visibility, accessibility, and impact of research across the company.  
- Empower product teams: Train, mentor, and enable product designers and product managers to conduct high-quality research independently, fostering a culture of continuous discovery.  
- Develop scalable practices: Create playbooks, templates, and tools that enable self-service research while maintaining rigor, quality, and consistency.  

Job title: Brand: lastminute.com  
Department: Revenue & Operations  
Location: Chiasso, Switzerland  
Contract: Full-time  
Main Language: English  
Apply now  

## Requisiti
- A naturally curious mindset, driven to uncover deep user insights.  
- Extensive hands-on experience in Product / UX Research, ideally within e-commerce, travel, or other consumer-facing industries.  
- Proven expertise in both generative and evaluative research, with the ability to translate insights into clear, actionable outcomes.  
- Fluency with AI tools to accelerate and scale UX research while maintaining quality and rigor.  
- A pragmatic and scientific approach, balancing methodological excellence with business needs and realities.  
- Experience mentoring and training cross-functional teams in research methods; leadership in building a culture of continuous discovery is a strong plus.  
- Advanced proficiency in English (written and spoken); knowledge of French, German, Italian, or Spanish is an advantage.  
- You value diversity and are respectful of cultural differences and backgrounds. You love to travel and feel that this is the place for you. :)  

## Cosa offriamo
### How we work together:
- An inclusive, friendly, and international environment (you’ll be working with colleagues from +10 countries and over 48 nationalities)  
- Shorter working week (36h as full time), with a half working day on Fridays  
- Flexible start and end of the working day  
- Possibility to work from anywhere for a period of time per year defined according to local regulations  

### How we learn together:
- Fri-Yays: half a day on Friday morning with a no-meeting mandate and dedicated to deep work, personal growth, learning and training and/or focus time.  
- Professional and managerial skills development training paths, access to e-learning platforms such as O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (depending on the department), and to our internal platform offering bespoke training content  

### Other perks:
- 2 paid days off per year for volunteering purposes  
- Occasional social events to foster connections among colleagues  
- Travel industry discounts and flash exclusive staff fares  
- We support our employees through life’s significant moments with leave options (e.g parental responsibilities, marriages, bereavements, relocations, etc.) in line with local laws.  

Wish you were here? We do, too!  

### Selection process steps*:
- HR interview (10-30 minutes)  
- 1st interview (Manager): soft skills + technical knowledge  
- Test step online or offline  
- 2nd interview (Manager + team member): Test review  
- Only for senior roles: final meeting (30 mins) with the Director  
- Offer extended  

(*Please note the process can slightly vary. The recruiter in charge will share more details when setting up the interview)  

Our commitment to celebrate diversity and generate belonging  
At the heart of our culture is a commitment to inclusion across race, gender, age, sexual orientation, religion, gender identity or expression, and accessibility. We strongly believe in an equal opportunity space, which is welcoming and celebrates the uniqueness of everyone who works here. We value different lived experiences and respect viewpoints, as we know unicity drives innovation. We want to make sure our people reflect the communities across the world we help travel.  

Eligibility criteria: By submitting your information and application, you confirm that you are legally authorised to work in the country of employment and that you do not require visa sponsorship to obtain employment visa status.  

Back to Job Search

We value different lived experiences and respect viewpoints, as we know unicity drives innovation.

Wir sind der europäische Travel-Tech-Führer in dynamischen Ferienpaketen. Mit Technologie verwandeln wir spontane Gedanken in bedeutende Erfahrungen, die helfen, die Welt zu reisen. jobs.title: Global Payroll & HR Systems Manager
jobs.description:
## Global Payroll & HR Systems Manager
Global Payroll & HR Systems Manager
corporate.lastminute.com
[https://corporate.lastminute.com/careers/job/?id=744000113487537&jobName=Global%20Payroll](https://corporate.lastminute.com/careers/job/?id=744000113487537&jobName=Global%20Payroll)

## Descrizione
We are looking for a Global Payroll & HR Systems Manager to join our team of around 1,700 people worldwide to help us power up the traveller’s journey for millions of holidaymakers. The role will focus on leading our global payroll operations, optimizing HR systems, and ensuring compliance across multiple geographies. If you have a strong background in global payroll management, HRIS implementation, and systems optimization, keep on reading, as you might be the perfect fit for this job.

## Job Title
- Global Payroll & HR Systems Manager

## Working Model
- Hybrid from Switzerland

## Team
- People Operations team

## Level
- Manager, reporting to Head of Payroll

## Location
- Chiasso, Switzerland

## Contract
- Permanent – full-time (EUR 36 h/week)

## What Your Impact Will Be
- Lead end-to-end global payroll operations for all countries, ensuring accuracy, timeliness, and compliance with local regulations.
- Own and manage all HR Systems (HRIS/HCM) globally, acting as the primary system administrator and continuous improvement driver.
- Lead global HRIS implementation and upgrade projects, ensuring seamless integration with other internal systems (e.g., Finance).
- Ensure global payroll and HR systems compliance and security protocols are met.
- Manage relationships with external payroll providers and HRIS vendors worldwide.
- Develop and maintain global reporting metrics on payroll, HR data, and systems performance for senior leadership.
- Provide expert guidance on best practices for payroll and HR systems configuration and data integrity.

## Job Title
- Brand: lastminute.com
- Department: People & Talent Growth
- Location: Chiasso, Switzerland
- Contract: Full-time
- Main Language: English

## Apply Now

## Qualifications
- Proven (at least 7 years) experience in Global Payroll management and HR Systems administration (e.g., Workday, SAP, Oracle).
- Deep knowledge of complex multi-country payroll processes and compliance requirements.
- Strong experience in leading HRIS implementation, integration, and optimization projects.
- Demonstrated ability to embrace change and challenge the status quo to improve operational efficiency.
- Strong ownership of the global HR Systems perimeter, with the ability to manage priorities and work autonomously.
- Excellent communication skills in English is essential. Any other additional language will be considered a plus.
- Desirable:
  - Experience in a travel or tech company environment.
  - Exposure to and/or experience with People Operations & Administration in any additional European and extra-European countries is a plus.

## Additional Information
### Perks of Working with Us
- **How we work together:**
  - An inclusive, friendly, and international environment (you’ll be working with colleagues from +10 countries and over 48 nationalities).
- **How we learn together:**
  - Professional and managerial skills development training paths, access to e-learning platforms such as O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (depending on the department), and to our internal platform offering bespoke training content.
- **Wish you were here? We do, too!**
  - Selection process steps:
    - HR interview (10-30 minutes)
    - 1st interview (Manager + HRBP): soft skills + technical knowledge
    - 2nd interview (Manager + Director)
    - Offer extended
  - *Please note the process can slightly vary. The recruiter in charge will share more details when setting up the interview.*

## Our Commitment to Celebrate Diversity and Generate Belonging
- At the heart of our culture is a commitment to inclusion across race, gender, age, sexual orientation, religion, gender identity or expression, and accessibility.
- We strongly believe in an equal opportunity space, which is welcoming and celebrates the uniqueness of everyone who works here.
- We value different lived experiences and respect viewpoints, as we know unicity drives innovation.
- We want to make sure our people reflect the communities across the world we help travel.

## Eligibility by Criteria
- By submitting your information and application, you confirm that you are legally authorised to work in the country of employment and that you do not require visa sponsorship to obtain employment visa status.

Marque: lastminute.com - Département: People & Talent Growth - Emplacement: Chiasso, Suisse - Contrat: Temps plein - Langue principale: Anglais ## Postulez maintenant ## Qualifications - Expérience prouvée (au moins 7 ans) en gestion de paie globale et administration des systèmes HR (par exemple, Workday, SAP, Oracle). - Connaissance approfondie des processus de paie multi-nationaux complexes et des exigences de conformité. - Expérience solide dans la direction des projets d'implémentation, d'intégration et d'optimisation HRIS. - Capacité démontrée à accepter le changement et à contester le statu quo pour améliorer l'efficacité opérationnelle. - Forte propriété du périmètre des systèmes HR globaux, avec la capacité de gérer les priorités et de travailler de manière autonome. - Bonnes compétences en communication en anglais sont essentielles. Toute autre langue supplémentaire sera considérée comme un plus. ## Informations supplémentaires ### Avantages de travailler avec nous - **Comment nous travaillons ensemble:** - Un environnement inclusif, amical et international (vous travaillerez avec des collègues de plus de 10 pays et plus de 48 nationalités). - **Comment nous apprenons ensemble:** - Chemins de développement professionnel et manageriel, accès aux plateformes d'apprentissage en ligne comme O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (selon le département) et à notre plateforme interne offrant un contenu de formation sur mesure. - **Souhaitez-vous être ici? Nous le faisons aussi!** - Étapes du processus de sélection: - Entretien HR (10-30 minutes) - 1st interview (Manager + HRBP): compétences douces + connaissances techniques - 2nd interview (Manager + Director) - Offrir - *Notez que le processus peut légèrement varier. Le recruteur en charge vous fournira plus de détails lors de la planification de l'entretien.* ## Notre engagement à célébrer la diversité et à générer un sentiment d'appartenance - Au cœur de notre culture se trouve un engagement à l'inclusion en fonction de la race, du sexe, de l'âge, de l'orientation sexuelle, de la religion, de l'identité de genre ou d'expression, et de l'accessibilité. - Nous croyons en un espace d'opportunités égales, qui est accueillant et célèbre l'unicité de tous ceux qui travaillent ici. - Nous valorisons les expériences de vie différentes et respectons les opinions, car nous savons que l'unicité stimule l'innovation. - Nous voulons nous assurer que nos employés représentent les communautés dans le monde entier que nous aidons à voyager. ## Eligibilité par critères - En soumettant vos informations et votre candidature, vous confirmez que vous êtes légalement autorisé à travailler dans le pays d'emploi et que vous n'avez pas besoin de sponsorisation de visa pour obtenir le statut de visa de travail.

jobs.description:
## Descrizione
# Head of Data Platform Engineering Careers
Head of Data Platform Engineering
corporate.lastminute.com
[https://corporate.lastminute.com/careers/job/?id=744000111059566&jobName=Head%20of%20Data%20Platform%20Engineering](https://corporate.lastminute.com/careers/job/?id=744000111059566&jobName=Head%20of%20Data%20Platform%20Engineering)

## Descrizione
We are looking for a Head of Data Platform Engineering to join our company of around 1,700 people worldwide to help us power up the traveller’s journey for millions of holidaymakers. If you’re passionate about building scalable, modern data platforms and leading teams to deliver data as a strategic asset, keep reading, as you might be the perfect fit for this job.

## Job Title
- Head of Data Platform Engineering

## Working Model
- Hybrid from Switzerland

## Team
- You will join the Data Warehouse team within the Data Platform Engineering area inside the Data department.

## Level
- Managerial and Tech leading with Accountable for managing people, setting direction and deploying resources and technical knowledge, reporting to Chief Data Officer

## Location
- Chiasso

## Contract
- Permanent full-time (EUR 36 h/week)

## Job Title
- Brand: lastminute.com
- Department: Data
- Location: Chiasso, Switzerland
- Contract: Full-time
- Main Language: English

## Apply now

## Qualifications
### What your impact will be:
- Build and evolve our data platform
- Design and implement our enterprise data infrastructure across cloud and hybrid environments
- Define reference architectures for modern data systems: data lakehouses, streaming pipelines, APIs, and microservices
- Ensure platform reliability, security, data quality, and regulatory compliance
- Oversee the full data lifecycle: ingestion, storage, processing, orchestration, and distribution
- Lead and develop your team
- Manage and mentor a team of Data Engineers and Data Architects
- Set technical direction, prioritize work, and manage performance
- Build a culture of collaboration, quality, and continuous learning
- Attract and retain top data talent
- Drive strategic impact
- Partner with the CDO to shape the organization’s data strategy
- Translate business needs into scalable, efficient technical solutions
- Collaborate with Data, Technology, and business stakeholders to align on priorities
- Continuously optimize platform performance, costs, and capabilities while evaluating emerging technologies

## Expertise
### Experience and leadership
- 5+ years in data engineering, platform engineering, or data architecture roles
- 3+ years leading technical teams, with proven ability to manage, mentor, and grow engineers
- Track record of delivering enterprise-scale data platforms in production environments
- Experience working closely with senior leadership and translating strategy into execution

### Technical depth
- Strong expertise in modern data architectures: data lakehouses, event-driven systems, streaming platforms
- Hands-on experience with cloud data platforms and hybrid environments
- Deep knowledge of data technologies: SQL and NoSQL databases, streaming systems, orchestration tools
- Proficiency with Python, SQL, and modern data tooling

### Strategic mindset
- Ability to balance technical excellence with business value
- Strong collaboration and stakeholder management skills
- Comfortable with ambiguity and driving clarity in complex environments

### Nice to Have
- Previous experience in travelling&tech oriented environments
- Certifications in cloud platforms

## Perks of working with us
### How we work together:
- An inclusive, friendly, and international environment (you’ll be working with colleagues from +10 countries and over 48 nationalities)

### How we learn together:
- Professional and managerial skills development training paths, access to e-learning platforms such as O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (depending on the department), and to our internal platform offering bespoke training content

### Selection process steps:
- HR interview (10-30 minutes)
- 1st interview (Manager + HRBP): soft skills + technical knowledge
- 2nd interview (Manager + HRBP + Director)

## Our commitment to celebrate diversity and generate belonging
At the heart of our culture is a commitment to inclusion across race, gender, age, sexual orientation, religion, gender identity or expression, and accessibility. We strongly believe in an equal opportunity space, which is welcoming and celebrates the uniqueness of everyone who works here. We value different lived experiences and respect viewpoints, as we know unicity drives innovation. We want to make sure our people reflect the communities across the world we help travel.

## Eligibility by criteria
By submitting your information and application, you confirm that you are legally authorised to work in the country of employment and that you do not require visa sponsorship to obtain employment visa status.

### Job Description
We are looking for a Software Engineer – Microservices & ETLs to join our team of around 1,700 people worldwide to help us power up the traveller’s journey for millions of holidaymakers. If you are passionate about building scalable microservices, developing robust APIs, and modernizing data integration workflows, keep on reading, you might be the perfect fit for this role.

### The job in brief:
- **Job Title:** Software Engineer
- **Working model:** hybrid from Chiasso
- **Team:** you will join the Finance Systems Engineering team
- **Level:** Professional
- **Location:** Chiasso, Switzerland
- **Contract:** Permanent – full-time (36 h/week)

### What your impact will be:
- Modernize legacy processes: Gradually transition monolithic ETL workflows toward a microservices-based ecosystem, identifying opportunities to reduce technical debt.
- Develop microservices: Design, write, and test high-quality software using practices such as TDD, DDD, Clean Code, and SOLID principles.
- Support data infrastructure: Maintain and optimize existing ETL pipelines built with Talend 7/8, ensuring full business continuity through effective KLO (Keep-the-Lights-On) activities.
- Automate Finance operations: Collaborate closely with Finance stakeholders to understand their needs and deliver solutions that automate manual or recurring processes.

### Job title: Brand: lastminute.com Department: Technology Location: Chiasso, Switzerland Contract: Full-time Main Language: English Apply now

### Qualifications
Your expertise:
- 1+ years of experience in software development, with hands-on experience using an OO/FP language — preferably Java or Kotlin
- Understanding of microservices architecture, REST API design patterns, and backend development
- Solid SQL skills and previous experience working with relational databases (MySQL, Vertica, PostgreSQL, or similar)
- Previous experience with ETL tools or data integration platforms (Talend, Informatica, SSIS, or similar)
- Ability to work effectively in a cross-functional, multilingual environment, translating business requirements into technical solutions and sharing knowledge with peers

### Desirable:
- Background in financial systems, e-commerce, or the travel industry
- Experience specifically with Talend 7 or Talend 8
- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices
- Experience using Git and version control workflows
- Previous experience with Clean Code, SOLID principles, and an Agile mindset
- Experience working with the Spring/Spring Boot ecosystem

### Additional Information
**Perks of working with us:**
- **How we work together:**
  - An inclusive, friendly, and international environment (you’ll be working with colleagues from +10 countries and over 48 nationalities)
  - Shorter working week (36h as full time), with a half working day on Fridays
  - Flexible start and end of the working day, with core hours from 10:00 to 4:00 pm
  - Possibility to work from anywhere for a period of time per year defined according to local regulations

- **How we learn together:**
  - Fri-Yays: half a day on Friday morning with a no-meeting mandate and dedicated to deep work, personal growth, learning and training and/or focus time.
  - Professional and managerial skills development training paths, access to e-learning platforms such as O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (depending on the department), and to our internal platform offering bespoke training content

- **Other perks:**
  - 2 paid days off per year for volunteering purposes
  - Occasional social events to foster connections among colleagues
  - Travel industry discounts and flash exclusive staff fares
  - We support our employees through life’s significant moments with leave options (e.g parental responsibilities, marriages, bereavements, relocations, etc.) in line with local laws.

- **Wish you were here? We do, too!**
  - Selection process steps:
    - HR interview (15-30 minutes)
    - Manager Interview
    - Technical Test
    - Offer extended (*Please note the process can slightly vary. The recruiter in charge will share more details when setting up the interview)

- **Our commitment to celebrate diversity and generate belonging:**
  - At the heart of our culture is a commitment to inclusion across race, gender, age, sexual orientation, religion, gender identity or expression, and accessibility.
  - We strongly believe in an equal opportunity space, which is welcoming and celebrates the uniqueness of everyone who works here.
  - We value different lived experiences and respect viewpoints, as we know unicity drives innovation.
  - We want to make sure our people reflect the communities across the world we help travel.

- **Eligibility criteria:**
  - By submitting your information and application, you confirm that you are legally authorised to work in the country of employment and that you do not require visa sponsorship to obtain employment visa status.

Sviluppare microservizi: Disegnare, scrivere e testare software di alta qualità utilizzando pratiche come TDD, DDD, Clean Code e principi SOLID. - Supportare l'infrastruttura dei dati: Mantenere e ottimizzare i flussi di lavoro ETL esistenti costruiti con Talend 7/8, garantendo la continuità del business attraverso attività KLO (Keep-the-Lights-On) efficaci. - 1+ anni di esperienza nella programmazione software, con esperienza pratica utilizzando un linguaggio OO/FP – preferibilmente Java o Kotlin - Comprensione dell'architettura dei microservizi, dei modelli di design API REST e del backend - Competenze solide in SQL e esperienza precedente nel lavorare con database relazionali (MySQL, Vertica, PostgreSQL, o simili) - Esperienza precedente con strumenti ETL o piattaforme di integrazione dei dati (Talend, Informatica, SSIS, o simili) - Capacità di lavorare efficacemente in un ambiente multistakeholder, multilingue, traducendo le esigenze aziendali in soluzioni tecniche e condividendo la conoscenza con i colleghi ### Desiderabili: - Background in sistemi finanziari, e-commerce o nel settore del viaggio - Esperienza specifica con Talend 7 o Talend 8 - Familiarità con i pipeline CI/CD e le pratiche DevOps - Esperienza nell'uso di Git e nei workflow di controllo di versione - Esperienza con Clean Code, principi SOLID e un mindset Agile - Esperienza nel lavorare con l'ecosistema Spring/Spring Boot ### Informazioni Aggiuntive **I benefici di lavorare con noi: - **Come lavoriamo insieme:** - Ora di inizio e fine del lavoro flessibili, con orari di lavoro centrali dalle 10:00 alle 16:00 - Possibilità di lavorare da qualsiasi luogo per un periodo di tempo annuale definito secondo le leggi locali - **Come impariamo insieme:** - Fri-Yays: metà giornata venerdì mattina con un mandato senza incontri e dedicata al lavoro profondo, alla crescita personale, all'apprendimento e/o al tempo di focus - Percorsi di sviluppo delle competenze professionali e manageriali, accesso a piattaforme di e-learning come O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (a seconda del dipartimento) e alla nostra piattaforma interna che offre contenuti di formazione personalizzati - **Altri benefici: - 2 giorni di congedo pagati all'anno per scopi di volontariato - Eventi sociali occasionali per favorire le connessioni tra i colleghi - Sconti nel settore del viaggio e biglietti esclusivi per il personale - Siamo qui per supportarti in momenti significativi della vita con opzioni di congedo (ad esempio, responsabilità parentali, matrimoni, funerali, relocazioni, ecc.) in linea con le leggi locali. - **Siamo qui per te? Il recruiter in carica condividerà più dettagli quando si stabilisce l'intervista) - **Il nostro impegno a celebrare la diversità e generare un senso di appartenenza:** - Al cuore della nostra cultura c'è un impegno a includere a livello di razza, genere, età, orientamento sessuale, religione, identità di genere o espressione, e accessibilità. - Crediamo in uno spazio di opportunità uguali, che è accogliente e celebra l'unicità di chiunque che lavora qui. - Valutiamo le esperienze di vita diverse e rispettiamo le opinioni, poiché sappiamo che l'unicità spinge l'innovazione. - Vogliamo assicurare che i nostri dipendenti riflettano le comunità a livello mondiale che aiutiamo a viaggiare. - **Criteri di Eligibilità: - Con la sottoscrizione delle tue informazioni e applicazione, confermi che sei autorizzato legalmente a lavorare nel paese di lavoro e che non hai bisogno di sponsorizzazione di visa per ottenere lo stato di visa di lavoro.
descriptionByLocale.de: ## Software Engineer – ETLs & Microservices ### Beschreibung Software Engineer – ETLs & Microservices ### Die Firma Bei lastminute.com leben wir für die Ferien. Wir sind der europäische Travel-Tech-Führer in dynamischen Ferienpaketen. Mit Technologie verwandeln wir spontane Gedanken in bedeutende Erfahrungen, die helfen, die Welt zu reisen. ### Stellenbeschreibung Wir suchen einen Software Engineer – Microservices & ETLs, um unser Team von etwa 1.700 Personen weltweit zu erweitern, um Millionen von Ferienreisenden zu unterstützen. Wenn Sie passioniert sind, skalierbare Microservices zu entwickeln, robuste APIs zu erstellen und Datenintegrationsworkflows zu modernisieren, lesen Sie weiter, Sie könnten perfekt für diese Position sein. ### Die Position im Überblick: - **Titel der Position:** Software Engineer - **Arbeitsmodell:** Hybrid aus Chiasso - **Team:** Sie werden dem Team für Finanzsysteme Engineering beitreten - **Niveau:** Professional - **Ort:** Chiasso, Schweiz - **Vertrag:** Permanenter – Vollzeit (36 h/Week) ### Dein Einfluss: - Modernisieren Sie die Legacy-Prozesse: Gradualer Übergang von monolithischen ETL-Workflows zu einem Microservices-basierten Ökosystem, Identifikation von Möglichkeiten zur Reduzierung des technischen Schulden. - Entwickeln Sie Microservices: Designen, Schreiben und Testen hochwertiger Software unter Verwendung von Praktiken wie TDD, DDD, Clean Code und SOLID-Prinzipien. - Unterstützen Sie die Dateninfrastruktur: Pflegen und optimieren Sie bestehende ETL-Pipelines, die mit Talend 7/8 erstellt wurden, um die vollständige Geschäftsunterbrechung durch effektive KLO (Keep-the-Lights-On)-Aktivitäten zu gewährleisten. - Automatisieren Sie Finanzoperationen: Arbeiten Sie eng mit Finanzstakeholdern zusammen, um deren Bedürfnisse zu verstehen und Lösungen zu liefern, die manuelle oder wiederkehrende Prozesse automatisieren. ### Titel der Position: Brand: lastminute.com Abteilung: Technologie Ort: Chiasso, Schweiz Vertrag: Vollzeit Hauptsprache: Englisch ### Qualifikationen Ihre Expertise: - 1+ Jahre Erfahrung in der Softwareentwicklung, mit praktischer Erfahrung bei der Verwendung einer OO/FP-Sprache – vorzugsweise Java oder Kotlin - Verständnis der Microservices-Architektur, REST-API-Designmuster und Backend-Entwicklung - Starke SQL-Kenntnisse und vorherige Erfahrung bei der Arbeit mit relationalen Datenbanken (MySQL, Vertica, PostgreSQL oder ähnlich) - Vorherige Erfahrung mit ETL-Tools oder Datenintegrationsplattformen (Talend, Informatica, SSIS oder ähnlich) - Fähigkeit, effektiv in einer crossfunktionalen, multilingualen Umgebung zu arbeiten, Geschäftsanforderungen in technische Lösungen zu übersetzen und Wissen mit Kollegen zu teilen ### Wünschenswert: - Hintergrund in Finanzsystemen, E-Commerce oder dem Reiseindustrie - Erfahrung speziell mit Talend 7 oder Talend 8 - Erfahrung mit CI/CD-Pipelines und DevOps-Praktiken - Erfahrung mit Git und Versionierungsworkflows - Vorherige Erfahrung mit Clean Code, SOLID-Prinzipien und einem Agile-Mindset - Erfahrung mit der Spring/Spring Boot-Ecosystem ### Weitere Informationen **Vorteile des Arbeits mit uns: - **Wie arbeiten wir zusammen:** - Ein inklusiver, freundlicher und internationaler Arbeitsumfeld (Sie werden mit Kollegen aus über 10 Ländern und über 48 Nationalitäten arbeiten) - Kurzerer Arbeitswoche (36h als Vollzeit), mit einer halben Arbeitszeit am Freitag - Flexible Start- und Endzeit des Arbeitszeit, mit Kernzeiten von 10:00 bis 16:00 - Möglichkeit, aus jedem Ort zu arbeiten für einen Zeitraum pro Jahr, der nach den lokalen Gesetzen definiert ist - **Wie lernen wir zusammen:** - Fri-Yays: halbe Tag Freitagmorgen mit einem Meeting-Freigabe und dediziert an tiefes Arbeiten, persönliches Wachstum, Lernen und Training und/oder Fokuszeit - Fortbildungswege für professionelle und manageriale Fähigkeiten, Zugang zu e-Learning-Plattformen wie O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (je nach Abteilung) und zu unserer internen Plattform, die maßgeschneiderte Trainingsinhalte bietet - **Andere Vorteile: - 2 bezahlte Tage pro Jahr für freiwillige Arbeit - Gelegentliche soziale Veranstaltungen, um Verbindungen unter Kollegen zu fördern - Reisebranchen-Geschenke und Flash-Exklusiv-Work-Fares - Wir unterstützen unsere Mitarbeiter durch wichtige Lebensmomente mit Urlaubsoptionen (z.B. Elternzeit, Heirat, Begräbnis, Umzug, etc.) im Einklang mit den lokalen Gesetzen. - **Sind Sie hier? Wir sind auch hier!** - Auswahlprozessschritte: - HR-Interview (15-30 Minuten) - Manager-Interview - Technischer Test - Bietung erteilt (*Bitte beachten Sie, dass der Prozess leicht variieren kann. Der in der Verantwortung stehende Recruiter wird Ihnen mehr Details teilen, wenn die Interviewanmeldung eingerichtet wird) - **Unser Engagement, Diversität zu feiern und ein Gefühl der Zugehörigkeit zu schaffen:** - Im Herzen unserer Kultur liegt ein Engagement, die Inklusion auf Basis von Rasse, Geschlecht, Alter, sexueller Orientierung, Religion, Geschlechtsidentität oder -ausdruck und Zugänglichkeit zu fördern. - Wir glauben an einen Raum der gleichen Chancen, der willkommen und die Einzigartigkeit von jedem ist, der hier arbeitet. - Wir schätzen unterschiedliche Lebenserfahrungen und respektieren Meinungen, weil wir wissen, dass Einzigartigkeit die Innovation treibt. - Wir möchten sicherstellen, dass unsere Mitarbeiter die Communities weltweit widerspiegeln, die wir helfen, zu reisen. - **Eligibilitätskriterien: - Durch die Abgabe Ihrer Informationen und Ihrer Bewerbung bestätigen Sie, dass Sie rechtlich berechtigt sind, in dem Land zu arbeiten, in dem Sie arbeiten, und dass Sie keine Visa-Sponsorship benötigen, um einen Arbeitsvisa zu erhalten.
descriptionByLocale.fr: ## Ingénieur Logiciel – ETLs & Microservices ### Description Ingénieur Logiciel – ETLs & Microservices ### La Société À lastminute.com, nous vivons les vacances. Nous sommes le leader européen en technologie de voyage pour les paquets de vacances dynamiques. Avec la technologie, nous transformons les pensées spontanées en expériences significatives, aidant les gens à voyager dans le monde. ### Description du poste Nous recherchons un Ingénieur Logiciel – Microservices & ETLs pour rejoindre notre équipe de environ 1 700 personnes à travers le monde afin d'aider à dynamiser l'expérience des millions de voyageurs. Si vous êtes passionné par la construction de microservices évolutifs, le développement d'API robustes et la modernisation des flux de travail d'intégration des données, continuez à lire, vous pourriez être le candidat idéal pour ce poste. ### Le poste en résumé: - **Titre du poste:** Ingénieur Logiciel - **Modèle de travail:** hybride de Chiasso - **Équipe:** vous rejoindrez l'équipe d'ingénierie des systèmes financiers - **Niveau:** professionnel - **Lieu:** Chiasso, Suisse - **Contrat:** permanent – temps plein (36 h/semaine) ### Votre impact: - Moderniser les processus hérités: Transition progressive des flux de travail ETL monolithiques vers un écosystème basé sur les microservices, identification des opportunités pour réduire la dette technique. - Développer des microservices: Conception, écriture et test de logiciels de haute qualité en utilisant des pratiques telles que TDD, DDD, Clean Code et les principes SOLID. - Soutenir l'infrastructure des données: Maintenir et optimiser les pipelines ETL existants construits avec Talend 7/8, garantissant la continuité du business grâce à des activités KLO (Keep-the-Lights-On) efficaces. - Automatiser les opérations financières: Collaborer étroitement avec les parties prenantes Financières pour comprendre leurs besoins et fournir des solutions qui automatisent les processus manuels ou récurrents. ### Titre du poste: Brand: lastminute.com Département: Technologie Lieu: Chiasso, Suisse Contrat: Temps plein Langue principale: Anglais ### Qualifications Votre expertise: - Compétences solides en SQL et expérience précédente dans le travail avec des bases de données relationnelles (MySQL, Vertica, PostgreSQL, ou similaires) - Expérience précédente avec des outils ETL ou des plateformes d'intégration des données (Talend, Informatica, SSIS, ou similaires) - Capacité à travailler efficacement dans un environnement multistakeholder, multilingue, traduisant les exigences d'affaires en solutions techniques et partageant la connaissance avec les pairs ### Désirable: - Expérience dans les systèmes financiers, e-commerce ou le secteur du voyage - Expérience spécifique avec Talend 7 ou Talend 8 - Familiarité avec les pipelines CI/CD et les pratiques DevOps - Expérience avec Git et les workflows de contrôle de version - Expérience avec Clean Code, les principes SOLID et une mentalité Agile - Expérience avec l'écosystème Spring/Spring Boot ### Informations supplémentaires **Les avantages de travailler avec nous: - **Comment nous travaillons ensemble:** - Heures de début et de fin du travail flexibles, avec des heures de travail centrales de 10:00 à 16:00 - Possibilité de travailler depuis n'importe où pour une période de temps annuelle définie selon les réglementations locales - **Comment nous apprenons ensemble:** - Fri-Yays: demi-journée vendredi matin avec un mandat sans réunion et dédié au travail profond, à la croissance personnelle, à l'apprentissage et/ou au temps de focus - Trajets de développement des compétences professionnelles et managériales, accès aux plateformes d'apprentissage en ligne comme O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (selon le département) et à notre plateforme interne offrant du contenu de formation sur mesure - Nous supportons nos employés à travers les moments significatifs de la vie avec des options de congé (par exemple, responsabilités parentales, mariages, funérailles, déménagements, etc.) en ligne avec les lois locales. - jobs.description:
## Descrizione
# Microsoft Business Central Specialist Careers
Microsoft Business Central Specialist
[corporate.lastminute.com](https://corporate.lastminute.com/careers/job/?id=744000108434226&jobName=Microsoft%20Business%20Central%20Specialist)

## Descrizione
We are looking for an MS Business Central Specialist to join our Chiasso based team and our company of around 1,700 people worldwide to help us power up the traveller’s journey for millions of holidaymakers. If you are a master in working on ERP solutions keep on reading, as you might be the perfect fit for this job.

## Job Title
- MS Business Central Specialist

## Working Model
- Hybrid from Chiasso

## Team
- You will join the Finance Systems Engineering team

## Level
- Professional

## Location
- Chiasso, Switzerland

## Contract
- Permanent – full-time (36 h/week)

## What your impact will be:
- Analyze and Design business processes and create functional specifications based upon information elicited from business users in order to recommend and deliver solutions to improve the efficiency and effectiveness of our ERP system Microsoft Dynamics Business Central
- Participate in system related business development projects
- Provide training and support for the Business Central users within the Microsoft Business Central application
- Create Business Central Functional specifications for configuration, integration with third party applications and Business Central customizations
- Produce documentation, training materials and demonstrations to the Business Central users
- Collaborate with Business and other company departments
- Contribute to knowledge base and knowledge transfer for Business Central upgrades
- Provide on-going support to users, managing Operations tickets to apply setup, configurations, create and revoke user accounts, fix runtime errors
- Support the implementation lifecycle following the principles of source control and CI/CD

## Job title
- Brand: lastminute.com
- Department: Technology
- Location: Chiasso, Switzerland
- Contract: Full-time
- Main Language: English

## Apply now

## Qualifications
### Your expertise:
- 3+ years with MS Business Central or MS Dynamics NAV experience
- Advanced knowledge of MS Business Central modules and functionality including:
  - Financial Management
  - G/L, Dimensions and Company configuration – Purchase/Sales Modules
- Experience in AL Coding strongly recommended
- Experience in Git methodology
- Advanced analytical and problem solving skills
- Fluency in English, both written and spoken

### Desirable:
- Experience in system integration and API/webservices functionality
- Knowledge of Microsoft SQL Server
- Knowledge of SaaS Business Central architecture

## Soft Skills
- Analytical and detail-oriented, yet pragmatic and delivery-focused
- Strong collaboration mindset with the ability to work effectively in cross-functional teams
- Curious, proactive and motivated to learn technologies beyond the ERP world
- Autonomous and accountable – you take ownership from design to delivery
- Passionate about improving systems, processes and overall code quality

## Additional Information
### Why join us:
- Work on a Finance Core Platform that is strategic for lastminute.com’s transformation and scalability.
- Collaborate in an international, fast-paced environment with strong engineering communities.
- Be part of a cross-functional culture that values learning, experimentation and continuous improvement.
- Contribute to the next generation of financial systems architecture for a European travel-tech leader.

### Perks of working with us:
- How we work together:
  - An inclusive, friendly, and international environment (you’ll be working with colleagues from +10 countries and over 48 nationalities)
  - Shorter working week (36h as full time), with a half working day on Fridays
  - Flexible start and end of the working day, with core hours from 10:00 to 4:00 pm
  - Possibility to work from anywhere for a period of time per year defined according to local regulations

- How we learn together:
  - Fri-Yays: half a day on Friday morning with a no-meeting mandate and dedicated to deep work, personal growth, learning and training and/or focus time.
  - Professional and managerial skills development training paths, access to e-learning platforms such as O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (depending on the department), and to our internal platform offering bespoke training content

- Other perks:
  - 2 paid days off per year for volunteering purposes
  - Occasional social events to foster connections among colleagues
  - Travel industry discounts and flash exclusive staff fares
  - We support our employees through life’s significant moments with leave options (e.g parental responsibilities, marriages, bereavements, relocations, etc.) in line with local laws.

- Wish you were here? We do, too!

### Selection process steps:
- HR interview (15-30 minutes)
- Manager Interview and Team Interview
- Offline Test

### Our commitment to celebrate diversity and generate belonging:
- At the heart of our culture is a commitment to inclusion across race, gender, age, sexual orientation, religion, gender identity or expression, and accessibility.
- We strongly believe in an equal opportunity space, which is welcoming and celebrates the uniqueness of everyone who works here.
- We value different lived experiences and respect viewpoints, as we know unicity drives innovation.
- We want to make sure our people reflect the communities across the world we help travel.

### Eligibility criteria:
- By submitting your information and application, you confirm that you are legally authorised to work in the country of employment and that you do not require visa sponsorship to obtain employment visa status.

Hybrid de Chiasso ## Équipe - Vous rejoindrez l'équipe de systèmes financiers ## Niveau - Professionnel ## Emplacement - Chiasso, Suisse ## Contrat - Permanent – temps plein (36 h/semaine) ## Impact que vous aurez: - Soutenir le cycle de vie de la mise en œuvre en suivant les principes de contrôle source et CI/CD ## Titre du poste - Marque: lastminute.com - Département: Technologie - Emplacement: Chiasso, Suisse - Autonome et responsable – vous prenez la responsabilité du design à la livraison - Passionné pour améliorer les systèmes, les processus et la qualité globale du code ## Informations supplémentaires ### Pourquoi rejoindre nous: - Travaillez sur une plateforme financière stratégique pour la transformation et la scalabilité de lastminute.com - Collaborez dans un environnement international et dynamique avec de fortes communautés d'ingénierie - Faites partie d'une culture transversale qui valorise l'apprentissage, l'expérimentation et l'amélioration continue - Contribuez à l'architecture des systèmes financiers de la prochaine génération pour un leader européen du voyage ### Avantages de travailler avec nous: - Comment nous travaillons ensemble: - Un environnement inclusif, friendly et international (vous travaillerez avec des collègues de plus de 10 pays et plus de 48 nationalités) - Semaine de travail plus courte (36 heures comme temps plein), avec une demi-journée de travail le vendredi - Possibilité de travailler de n'importe où pour une période de temps annuelle définie selon les réglementations locales - Comment nous apprenons ensemble: - Fri-Yays: demi-journée vendredi matin avec un mandat sans réunion et dédié au travail profond, à la croissance personnelle, à l'apprentissage et à l'entraînement et/ou au temps de concentration - Chemins de développement des compétences professionnelles et managériales, accès aux plateformes d'apprentissage en ligne comme O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (selon le département) et à notre plateforme interne offrant du contenu de formation sur mesure - Autres avantages: - 2 jours de congé payés par an pour des activités de bénévolat - Événements sociaux occasionnels pour favoriser les connexions entre les collègues - Remises dans le secteur du voyage et des billets exclusifs pour le personnel - Nous soutenons nos employés à travers les moments significatifs de la vie avec des options de congé (par exemple, responsabilités parentales, mariages, funérailles, relocalisations, etc.) en conformité avec les lois locales. - Souhaitez-vous être ici? Nous aussi! ### Processus de sélection: - Entretien HR (15-30 minutes) - Entretien Manager et Entretien d'équipe - Test en ligne ### Notre engagement à célébrer la diversité et à générer un sentiment d'appartenance: - Au cœur de notre culture, il y a un engagement à promouvoir l'inclusion en fonction de la race, du sexe, de l'âge, de l'orientation sexuelle, de la religion, de l'identité de genre ou d'expression, et de l'accessibilité - Nous croyons en un espace d'opportunités égales qui est accueillant et célèbre l'unicité de tous ceux qui travaillent ici - Nous valorisons les expériences de vie différentes et respectons les opinions, car nous savons que l'unicité stimule l'innovation - Nous voulons nous assurer que nos employés reflètent les communautés à travers le monde que nous aidons à voyager. ### Critères d'éligibilité: - En soumettant vos informations et votre candidature, vous confirmez que vous êtes légalement autorisé à travailler dans le pays d'emploi et que vous n'avez pas besoin de sponsorisation de visa pour obtenir le statut de visa de travail.
